headline: Previously Rejected Articles Now Recovered
subject: Recovered Articles

article_items.title: Company : The Verge AI
article_items.description: [HIGH] Minecraft Dungeons 2 gets a September release date Company : The Verge AI Summary : Minecraft Dungeons 2, a sequel to Microsoft's dungeon crawler spinoff Minecraft Dungeons, will be released on September 29th. The company originally revealed the game in a brief trailer in March, prom Link :
